name: chopsticks
description: Turn-based Codex Desktop collaboration with room locks, Git-backed handoffs, and Supabase transcript snapshots.

interface.shortDescription: Turn-based shared Codex rooms and handoffs.
interface.longDescription: Chopsticks coordinates Codex Desktop sessions through room membership, per-chat lock leases, GitHub code state, Supabase transcript snapshots, and durable handoff metadata.
defaultPrompt: Create a handoff for this Codex chat.
Take over from the latest Chopsticks handoff.
